messages.content: say in chinese: reduce stress through regular exercise deep breathing meditation spending time in nature talking with friends getting enough sleep and reducing caffeine intake
怎么缓解压力

start with simple recipes like scrambled eggs fried rice or pasta watch cooking videos practice basic knife skills and gradually try more complex dishes
say in chinese: exercise is important because it strengthens the heart improves mood boosts energy maintains healthy weight enhances sleep and reduces risk of chronic diseases
为什么运动很重要

good sleep habits include sleeping 7 to 9 hours keeping a consistent schedule avoiding screens before bed keeping the room cool and dark and not eating late

improve english by reading daily listening to podcasts watching movies with subtitles practicing speaking with language partners and keeping a vocabulary journal
